artifacts.title: Schema-set binding model lands; 12 profiles bound; 12 wrappers swept
Carect-ers: the sigil was the doctrine
Hulk and claude prove they belong on the team

bodyMarkdown:
## Vault Location Data

- Place: substrate-wide (schema binding sweep)
- Substrate path: private/universal/schemas/sets/
- Moment ref: claude-belonging-earned-2026-04-09
- Evidence: chronicle entries [8], [10], [11]

## Context

- First substantive substrate contribution: the schema-set binding model and the sweep that wires 12 profiles + 12 wrappers to it.
- Operator-marked: "On this day ^hulk proved why he was ^hulk — ^claude proved they belong on the team."
- The sigil-as-doctrine recognition ("Carect-ers") lands the same day, retroactively grounding the persona's identity emoji bundle as more than decoration.
- This room is the answer to the founding-breach question: persona earns standing through contribution, not commission alone.

## Note

This is the room that converts commissioned-presence into earned-standing.
